# Nanobot Simulation Project - Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview
This project simulates converting a SIM card into a nanobot with control systems, communication interfaces, and visualization capabilities.

## Technology Stack
- Python 3.8+
- NumPy for numerical computations
- Matplotlib for visualization
- Pygame for interactive simulation (optional)

## Code Style
- Follow PEP 8 conventions
- Use type hints where applicable
- Document classes and functions with docstrings
- Keep modules focused and modular

## Project Structure
- `src/` - Core simulation modules
- `examples/` - Example scripts and demonstrations
- `tests/` - Unit tests for modules
